data.title: Power Pet® Earns High Praise From IBS, CES, and More During 2026 Pet Tech Awards Season
data.description: In late 2025, Power Pet® unveiled its latest model, the Power Pet® Roll Up Door, the first of its kind in the automatic dog door industry. The new model received significant recognition in the 2026 pet technology awards circuit, earning acclaim at events such as the International Builders' Show (IBS) and the Consumer Electronics Show (CES). The innovative door stood out amongst competitors and was praised for its advanced features and functionality.

data.title: Three Sixty Seven Represents McCarl's Services in its Sale to United Building Solutions, a Portfolio Company of AE Industrial Partners
data.description: Three Sixty Seven Advisors acted as the sole advisor for McCarl's Services in a recent transaction. The announcement was made in Cranberry Township, Pennsylvania on April 29, 2026. McCarl's Services Incorporated, a commercial company, was involved in the successful transaction.

data.title: American Family Insurance to Launch "Designed To Last" on Hulu
data.description: Starting on May 5th, 2026, a unique competition reality show called "Designed To Last" will be available for streaming. This groundbreaking series is brought by American Family Insurance and aims to revolutionize the concept of safeguarding. The program presents a fresh perspective on the importance of protection and will provide viewers with valuable insights.

data.title: Climate Change AI Innovation Grants Award $1.7M to Projects Worldwide
data.description: A group of interdisciplinary individuals who are utilizing artificial intelligence to combat climate change have been granted funding through the renowned Climate Change AI Innovation Grants Program for pivotal projects and the development of datasets. The announcement was made in Pittsburgh on April 29, 2026. Climate Change AI disclosed the recipients of the awards in their latest update.

data.title: Asian Americans Advancing Justice Southern California Highlights Key Data on AAPI Communities Ahead of AAPI Heritage Month
data.description: New research findings released in Los Angeles on April 29, 2026, debunk common myths and misconceptions surrounding the rapidly expanding ethnic community. These reports shed light on disparities in various aspects such as housing, healthcare, employment, and language accessibility within Southern California's diverse population. The study examines crucial issues affecting this community, emphasizing significant discrepancies in important areas.

data.title: Power Pet® Door App Update: What's New, What's Improved, and What it Means for Pet Owners
data.description: High Tech Pet is committed to revolutionizing pet care by introducing advanced, secure pet technology to enhance the lives of pets and their owners. With tens of thousands of households benefiting from the Power Pet® Door, our innovative solutions prioritize convenience and safety for pets.

data.title: HostPapa Acquires Hostwinds, Expanding Global Hosting Footprint and Full-Stack Infrastructure Capabilities
data.description: Acquisition has been completed by HostPapa, Inc., a prominent global web hosting provider based in Burlington, ON on April 29, 2026. This transaction brings in a high-quality web hosting brand that operates data centers in North America and Europe. It expands HostPapa's range of services beyond shared hosting to include cloud and dedicated server solutions. This move positions HostPapa as a competitive player in the industry, with a wider geographical reach and a more comprehensive service portfolio.

data.title: San Diego County Bar Association Issues Evaluations For Judicial Candidates in June 2, 2026 Primary Election
data.description: The SDCBA has released evaluations for eight candidates competing for five judicial seats in the San Diego Superior Court during the upcoming June 2, 2026 primary election. Since 1978, the SDCBA has been assessing judicial candidates to aid the public in making informed decisions.

data.title: Cinco de Mayo 2026: AdMall's AudienceSCAN Provides Critical Intelligence for Tapping into Hispanic Buying Power
data.description: Recent data showcases the significant economic purchasing influence of the Latino population in the United States, reaching an all-time high of $4.1 trillion as per a recent report. In order to assist businesses and media sales teams in effectively engaging with this profitable demographic, AdMall® is featuring its most recent findings.

data.title: The Power of AI from AccrediReady Now Streamlines the CARF Process
data.description: In Cleveland on April 29, 2026, it was reported that behavioral health agencies have seen significant benefits in terms of saving time, money, and preventing errors. This positive impact is attributed to the use of AccrediReady, an online web service designed to streamline annual processes for behavioral health professionals. The service has resulted in notable reductions in costs and time spent on tasks, while also helping to minimize costly errors.
